title: Oberseminar Smart Healthcare Systems
further_info: The Oberseminar will take place on Thursday from 10:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. in Meeting Room 443, 4th floor, INF 368. Please note that this is not the Seminar course. Credits for this course cannot be counted toward the master’s degree program; instead, upon successful completion, it will be listed in the transcript of records as an additional course.
